series_metadata.series_description: These reports (T-1 form) created in the School Foundation Payment system and used by school district requesting reimbursement for transporting students. Categories of information include numbers of buses by model year and type, public and non-public pupils, grade level, itemized expenses, special data, and school location.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Data is entered into the Department computer, retained for 10 years, and then erased ; Paper: Paper maintained in Pupil Transportation section files for 2 years., then sent to storage for 8 years., then destroyed, Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
